response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and deep systems skills in event-driven architectures and distributed systems — but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems at scale in regulated fintech, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing multi-agent frameworks with financial compliance rigor — key for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven expertise in event-driven systems, microservices, and low-latency backend design
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in distributed platforms like GISCollective
concerns: No demonstrable track record in fintech infrastructure or regulated AI systems (credit, compliance, liquidity)
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear experience with model-agnostic agentic architectures, real-time inference pipelines, or AI evaluation infrastructure
